summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WorldMap and Reviews functionality. WorldMap uses react-simple-maps with real country borders highlighted in gold. Reviews section shows 6 on homepage with 'Read All Reviews 20' button linking to /about page showing all 20 reviews. Platform badges link to correct external URLs. Backend API fully functional.

integration_issues.issue: Connection lines from Europe to intercontinental locations not visible
Read All Reviews button text doesn't change from English to Italian when language is switched

passed_tests: 19 countries highlighted in gold on map
Reviews section shows '20 verified reviews' count
Read All Reviews button with count badge (20)
Platform badges clickable with correct external URLs
All review cards have proper platform links (Google Maps, Trustpilot, LinkedIn)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix connection lines visibility on WorldMap (currently not visible) and ensure language switcher properly changes Read All Reviews button text to Italian ('Leggi Tutte le Recensioni')
